dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent failed to incorporate governance rules due to a JSON parsing error in the context builder, preventing alignment with established constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The assessment demonstrated deep causal analysis through a high volume of processed tokens and successful schema validation during the architectural impact phase.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: General trade-offs were addressed in the final assessment, though the specific tension between governance and architecture was under-explored due to upstream failures.
